# AltCrew

> AltCrew is an Indian social fitness app that helps people find a community to train with: running, lifting, yoga, walking, cycling, swimming, anything physical. Strava tells you what you did. AltCrew tells you who you can do it with.

## Launch
- Date: Sunday, May 31, 2026
- Event: Vizag Fitness & Flea Fest 2026
- Venue: Sai Priya Resorts, Visakhapatnam, India
- Time: 9:00 AM – 10:00 PM
- App drops: 7:30 PM at the on-stage Founders Q&A
- Tickets: Sold on BookMyShow.

## Available cities at launch
- Visakhapatnam (Vizag) only. More cities open as we have the people to support them well.

## Features
- PacePals: pacing partner matching
- Flash Album: 24-hour event photo album, unlocks at the event, shareable to Instagram
- Shoe Locker: gear log
- Smart Waivers: digital waivers for organizers

## Pricing
- Free for members
- Free for community organizers through August 2026
- Paid organizer tier launches September 2026

## Founder
- Abhishikth, based in Vizag. Lost 35 kg in a year through walking, weight training, and structured diet, with a coach who believed in him.

## Site
- Homepage: https://altcrew.in
- Contact: hello@altcrew.in
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/altcrew.in
